UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user progress, coins, and unlocked items.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

coins.description: Number of coins the user has.

unlockedSkins.description: List of skin IDs unlocked by the user.

selectedSkin.description: The ID of the currently selected skin.

unlockedMusic.description: List of music track IDs unlocked.

selectedMusic.description: The ID of the currently selected music.

unlockedDeathPhrases.description: List of death phrase IDs unlocked.

selectedDeathPhrase.description: The ID of the currently selected death phrase.

LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A single entry in the global leaderboard.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.
